HOST SWIPE FILE
See Grant in action across a variety of his podcast shows.
NOTE: All of Grant’s shows are also posted on grantcardonetv.com
This was one of Grant’s most downloaded podcasts, likely because the title is eye
catching. Notice how the episode was edited to start with a real world money
example, and also with humor from Grant. The episode is filled with real world
examples, and also gives some behind-the-scenes looks. Remember, many podcasts
are recorded as videos, and you can see the advantage of that here.
Link: 10xresource.com/pcsf6
#1 	Cardone Zone - Turn $5K into $1 Million
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

This is a perfect example of how podcasts can allow you to connect with high-level
people. Grant kept the tone of the interview light, but also did his homework, so he
had lots to pull from. Notice how Grant builds rapport with Gary, even
subconsciously mimicking his body language (see 16:58). Above all else, Grant gave
Gary lots of questions, space and opportunity to share value with his audience.
Link: 10xresource.com/pcsf7
#2 	Power Players - Gary Vaynerchuck
This show really embodies Grant’s mantra of “build a life, not a brand”. During the
G&E show, Grant and his wife Elena share insights of how they live, work and play
together. Viewers get amazing insights on how to build an empire, and have happy
relationships. Above all else, you can see the true love and respect that Grant has for
Elena, and learn from the dynamic if you have a co-host or a life partner.
Link: 10xresource.com/pcsf8
#3 	G&E Show - Commit First, Figure Out Later
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

Young Hustlers is a show that Grant started with company president Jarrod Glandt.
This shows Grant’s commitment to rising up the talent in his organization. As the
episodes of this show go on, you see Jarrod continue to get stronger and stronger on
camera, to the point where he now does the show alone, and it is more popular than
ever. This show is a great combination of practical advice and fun.
Link: 10xresource.com/pcsf9
#4 	Young Hustlers- How to Make Selling Easy
We’ve included this because it was the first time that Grant streamed an episode of
the Cardone Zone on video and YouTube. It is important to understand how using
podcast content in multiple formats can increase your reach. Cardone Zone was
originally a traditional radio show, then later was picked up by XM Radio. Regardless
of the format, Grant continued to make content year after year after year.
Link: 10xresource.com/pcsf10
#5 	Cardone Zone - Middle Class Getting Squeezed
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
